Edit and raw actions

# PSOSP: 原噬菌体SOS依赖性预测器

PSOSP (**P**rophage **SOS** dependency **P**redictor) 通过分析LexA蛋白与靶DNA的结合异质性指数（*HI*），预测原噬菌体的诱导模式，将原噬菌体分类为SOS依赖型（SdPs）和SOS非依赖型（SiPs）。

[![PSOSP-LOGO](https://private-user-images.githubusercontent.com/67539352/458417634-3f02c2e6-5596-4293-970f-45e60139e6a9.png?jwt=eyJ0eXAiOiJKV1QiLCJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..XpuIgi1GKIH3oihi0PvAJuROcbr4y7xUQKsu7XP96Vk)](https://private-user-images.githubusercontent.com/67539352/458417634-3f02c2e6-5596-4293-970f-45e60139e6a9.png?jwt=eyJ0eXAiOiJKV1QiLCJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..XpuIgi1GKIH3oihi0PvAJuROcbr4y7xUQKsu7XP96Vk)

[![GitHub Release](https://camo.githubusercontent.com/2266ffbb2aca3eca50e503eb36a752b3b2ea0de3c4434654d2091ed447063c33/68747470733a2f2f696d672e736869656c64732e696f2f6769746875622f762f72656c656173652f6d756a69657a68616e672f70736f73703f7374796c653d666c6174)](https://camo.githubusercontent.com/2266ffbb2aca3eca50e503eb36a752b3b2ea0de3c4434654d2091ed447063c33/68747470733a2f2f696d672e736869656c64732e696f2f6769746875622f762f72656c656173652f6d756a69657a68616e672f70736f73703f7374796c653d666c6174)
[![Conda Downloads](https://camo.githubusercontent.com/1d1a8233175cbfbd4a7d1955d40946691bdec3235ea7a18bf2bed02be423326c/68747470733a2f2f696d672e736869656c64732e696f2f636f6e64612f646e2f62696f636f6e64612f70736f73703f7374796c653d666c6174266c6162656c3d42696f636f6e6461253230646f776e6c6f61647326636f6c6f723d253233393743413030)](https://anaconda.org/bioconda/psosp)
[![GitHub License](https://camo.githubusercontent.com/d140293eb115389c2bd98c08cafb09caa89cd0456f6b2aa3bb9d8e34c17e38f9/68747470733a2f2f696d672e736869656c64732e696f2f6769746875622f6c6963656e73652f6d756a69657a68616e672f70736f73703f7374796c653d666c6174)](https://anaconda.org/bioconda/psosp)
[![conda release](https://camo.githubusercontent.com/cc5688f31abe72b50cd85b4b513d69c91cdc262db4c39d1a33941af08857a37f/68747470733a2f2f616e61636f6e64612e6f72672f62696f636f6e64612f70736f73702f6261646765732f76657273696f6e2e737667)](https://anaconda.org/bioconda/psosp)

## Webserver

[![Total Predictions](https://camo.githubusercontent.)](https://vee-lab.sjtu.edu.cn/PSOSP/)

我们提供了一个在线平台（PSOSP）用于快速预测噬菌体诱导模式：**<https://vee-lab.sjtu.edu.cn/PSOSP>**

## 背景

### 基本原理

温和噬菌体作为前噬菌体整合到细菌宿主基因组中。在正常条件下，LexA蛋白与前噬菌体中的SOS box结合，抑制噬菌体相关基因的表达，维持溶原状态。当受到外部刺激（如暴露于DNA损伤剂）时，RecA蛋白被激活，导致LexA自切割并从SOS box上解离。这解除了对前噬菌体的抑制，触发温和噬菌体进入裂解周期，从而促进其复制。

[![psosp-theory](https://private-user-images.githubusercontent.com/67539352/458405584-654a77e1-dbb6-44bb-9719-0fe4fca7519c.jpg?jwt=eyJ0eXAiOiJKV1QiLCJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..V9bCRNmfEioyTnmTMNlbT_V79Mm5qPm_w0ub_bBJzOg)](https://private-user-images.githubusercontent.com/67539352/458405584-654a77e1-dbb6-44bb-9719-0fe4fca7519c.jpg?jwt=eyJ0eXAiOiJKV1QiLCJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..V9bCRNmfEioyTnmTMNlbT_V79Mm5qPm_w0ub_bBJzOg)

### 工作流程

* 鉴定LexA和经典SOS box（CBS）：扫描宿主基因组以鉴定LexA蛋白和位于lexA基因上游的经典SOS box（CSBs）
* 异质性指数（*HI*）计算：识别细菌基因组中的PSBs (Potential SOS Boxes)，计算每个PSB的异质性指数（*HI*），并通过Mean Shift聚类结果建立分类阈值（*HIc1* 和 *HIc2*）
* 在前噬菌体中扫描PSB：在前噬菌体启动子区域扫描PSBs并确定最小 *HI*（*HImin*）
* 前噬菌体分类：通过比较 *HImin* 与阈值评估LexA与前噬菌体启动子区域的结合能力

  + *HImin* ≤ *HIc1* → **SdP**（SOS依赖型前噬菌体）
  + *HImin* ≥ *HIc2* → **SiP**（SOS非依赖型前噬菌体）
  + *HIc1* < *HImin* < *HIc2* → **SuP**（SOS不确定型前噬菌体）

[![PSOSP_workflow](https://private-user-images.githubusercontent.com/67539352/459431743-c3a0334f-ce4f-4533-960a-ae8c19b71514.jpg?jwt=eyJ0eXAiOiJKV1QiLCJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..I2rgFyub7pJqrSGxs1VoftmekDFpah0t1h7doY9xmyE)](https://private-user-images.githubusercontent.com/67539352/459431743-c3a0334f-ce4f-4533-960a-ae8c19b71514.jpg?jwt=eyJ0eXAiOiJKV1QiLCJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9.eyJpc3MiOiJnaXRodWIuY29tIiwiYXV
